body.title: Stamp template provenance on expanded facia nodes
body.result: instantiate_template() now stamps template_source=<id> (canonical) and carries standards_ref from schema to expanded nodes; template_origin kept for compat
body.description: When a facia template node is instantiated/expanded, resulting nodes carry metadata.template_source=<template_id>. Enables HYPOTHESIZE to see which template spawned a task and pull its standards_ref for injection.
